Who I Am

Not outside advice.
Lived experience.

Bamidele Itunuoluwa
Education Leadership & Impact Strategist
◆

BSc. Education (Biology)University of Ilorin · Second Class Honours · 2017

You have been working hard. Applying, submitting, building, leading. And still — the scholarship keeps going to someone else. The grant proposal comes back unanswered. The organisation you poured yourself into can't seem to attract the funding it deserves. The problem is rarely your qualification. It is almost always your positioning and your systems. That is exactly what I fix.

I founded Giddy2School Nigeria in 2021 to tackle the 20.6 million out-of-school children crisis. Within three years, we remedied a 95% school dropout rate in our target communities, empowered 634+ fellows, distributed ₦20M+ in scholarships and resources, and got our curriculum adopted by thousands of stakeholders across Nigeria and Africa. I know what it takes to build something from nothing — with limited resources, high expectations, and real stakes.

As a Programme Manager responsible for over 379,000 pupils across 1,289 schools, I built the skills to manage large-scale impact programmes, consult for government, and deliver for impact-focused organisations — having managed a World Bank-supported state-wide education programme from the inside.

Today, I volunteer on the NESG Education Policy Commission, contributing to national education reform through evidence-based advocacy. I have been selected as a global fellow six times, recognised by the President of Kenya, and published in an international peer-reviewed journal. I bring all of that to every client I work with.

"I built Consult Itunuoluwa because I kept meeting brilliant people and organisations who had everything except the systems, positioning, and support to reach the next level."

Global Opportunities

Scholarship strategy, SOP writing, fellowship advisory — for young Africans who deserve to be in the room.

Impact Systems

M&E, proposals, programme design — for organisations doing extraordinary work that needs to be fundable.

Leadership Development

Career coaching, executive presence, workshops — for individuals and institutions investing in human capital.

Education Policy

System-level consulting for governments, INGOs, and development partners working on education reform.

Services & Investment

You already have what it takes.
Let's make sure the right people see it.

Every package is built around one thing: getting you the outcome you have been working toward. Not advice. Not a report. A result you can point to — and build on.

01 · For Individuals

The Scholarship Blueprint

You have been rejected before — and you know it wasn't your grades. The problem is your story isn't landing. We fix your SOP, sharpen your CV, and make sure the selection committee sees exactly who you are.

  • SOP review & full rewrite (2 drafts)
  • CV optimisation for global programmes
  • 1 mock interview session
  • Application strategy document
  • 5-day turnaround guaranteed
₦75,000 / engagement
Book a call → Pay Now →
02 · For Individuals — Most Popular

The Global Access Intensive

Chevening. Commonwealth. Fulbright. Rhodes. You have the profile for it — but the application process is brutal and most people go in blind. This is full strategic partnership from positioning to acceptance.

  • Everything in Scholarship Blueprint
  • LinkedIn profile optimisation
  • Research framing & programme fit analysis
  • 2 mock interview sessions
  • 30-day WhatsApp access & support
  • Referee briefing templates
₦150,000 / engagement
Book a call → Pay Now →
03 · For Individuals

Career Clarity & Leadership Coaching

You are capable of more — but you can't quite see the path. Maybe you're stuck, overlooked, or just spinning. This session cuts through the noise and gives you a clear, actionable direction in 90 minutes.

  • 90-min 1:1 career mapping session
  • Skill gap & opportunity analysis
  • 30-day personalised action plan
  • LinkedIn audit & positioning review
  • Follow-up voice note within 48 hrs
₦50,000 / session
Book a call → Pay Now →
04 · For Organisations

NGO Systems Setup & Donor Readiness

Your NGO is doing real work — but donors keep passing you over. It is almost never the work itself. It is the documentation, the M&E, the credibility signals. We build the systems that make funders say yes.

  • M&E framework design & documentation
  • Operational systems structure
  • Donor readiness assessment & gap report
  • Proposal template (1 target funder)
  • 30-day implementation support
₦750,000 / engagement
Enquire →
05 · For Organisations

Grant Proposal Writing & Strategy

You have a deadline, a funder, and a strong programme — but a weak proposal. Most Nigerian organisations lose funding not because of their work, but because their proposals don't speak the funder's language. Ours do.

  • Full proposal narrative & structure
  • Budget development & justification
  • Log frame / theory of change
  • Donor-specific customisation & tone
  • Supporting documents review
₦120,000 – ₦200,000 / proposal
Enquire →
06 · For Schools & Institutions

School Impact Audit & Transformation

Your school is working hard — but outcomes, funding, and credibility aren't where they should be. A fresh set of expert eyes, a data-backed report, and a 90-day roadmap that actually gets implemented.

  • 2-day on-site campus assessment
  • Stakeholder & staff interviews
  • Comprehensive impact report
  • 90-day improvement roadmap
  • Leadership team debrief session
₦500,000 / engagement
Enquire →
07 · Retainer

Strategic Advisory Retainer

Your organisation needs more than a one-off project — it needs a thinking partner. Monthly access to expert strategy, proposal review, M&E oversight, and on-demand support. For organisations building for the long term.

  • 2× monthly strategy calls
  • Proposal & report review on demand
  • WhatsApp access (24-hr response)
  • Quarterly planning & review session
  • Priority booking for all new services
₦200,000 – ₦500,000 / month
Enquire →
08 · Speaking & Training

Executive Workshop & Institutional Training

Your team, students, or community needs more than motivation — they need tools. Custom-designed, practically grounded, and facilitated by someone who has done the work. Half-day to full-day formats available.

  • Bespoke workshop design for your audience
  • Facilitation (up to 50 participants)
  • Participant workbooks & materials
  • Post-session resource pack
  • Certificate of participation included
From ₦150,000 / session
Enquire →

All engagements start with a free 20-minute discovery call. 50% upfront, 50% on delivery. Payments via Paystack (₦) or Flutterwave (USD). Not sure which service fits? Book a call and I will give you a direct, evidence-based recommendation.

Speaking & Events

Bringing a room to
the edge of their seats.

Itunuoluwa is available for keynotes, panel discussions, workshops, and institutional facilitation across education, youth development, and impact investment contexts.

The African Opportunity Gap: Why Talent Isn't the Problem

Keynote
A data-led examination of why millions of qualified young Africans are being overlooked — and the systems, positioning strategies, and policy shifts that change the equation. Delivered at youth summits, university convocations, and international development forums.

Education for the 21st Century: Reimagining What We Teach and Why

Keynote / Panel
Drawing from field research, classroom experience, and policy engagement — a frank analysis of why Nigeria's education system is producing graduates the labour market cannot use, and what systemic reform looks like in practice.

From Impact to Infrastructure: Building NGOs That Funders Actually Trust

Workshop
An interactive session for nonprofit leaders on the systems, documentation, and credibility markers that separate funded organisations from excellent ones. Practical, evidence-based, and directly applicable.

AI, Access, and the Future of Education in the Global South

Panel / Keynote
Based on published and forthcoming research on AI-enabled education access in low-resource contexts. What works, what is hype, and what policymakers need to understand before building the next generation of EdTech solutions.

Leadership That Lasts: Developing Young Africans for the Roles That Don't Exist Yet

Workshop / Bootcamp
An experiential leadership programme grounded in the Giddy2School Leadership Modules — adopted by Lagos TESCOM, trained 147+ teachers. Designed for student cohorts, emerging professionals, and institutional capacity-building.
Speaker · Youth Development Forum
International Leadership · Boston, USA

Speaking formats & availability

🎤
Keynote Address

45–60 minutes. International conferences, national summits, university convocations, corporate events. In-person or virtual.

💬
Panel Discussion

Education, youth development, nonprofit management, global opportunities, African leadership. Moderator or panelist.

🎓
Workshop / Bootcamp

Half-day to two-day. Scholarship prep, leadership development, NGO systems, education innovation.

🏛️
Policy & Government Forums

Evidence-based presentations for government ministries, development agencies, and education reform working groups.

Previously presented at: Youth Energy Summit Kenya (awarded by President Ruto), International Teachers & Educators Program (Poland, Ministry of Foreign Affairs), Mountaintop International Leadership Institute (Edmond & Lily Safra Center for Ethics, Harvard University), NESG Education Policy Forums (Abuja), UN SDSN Global Schools Programme, K-12 Digest International, and NGYouthSDGs platforms across Africa.

Travels from: Lagos | Abuja, Nigeria. Available nationally and internationally.

How It Works

Simple. Structured.
Clear at every stage.

1

You Book a Free Call

20 minutes. Diagnostic, not transactional. You tell me where you are and what you want. I give you a direct, evidence-based assessment of how I can help.

2

You Get a Clear Plan

Within 24 hours: a specific package, exact deliverables, timeline, and payment link. No vague proposals. No "let's keep talking." A real plan.

3

We Do the Work Together

You show up. I deliver. Every engagement is documented, tracked, and built around your specific outcome. 50% upfront, 50% on completion.

4

You Get the Result

We review what changed, document your win, and talk about what's next. Many clients stay on for retainer — because results create appetite.
